title: fix(registry): reset gemini-search to base Vertex rates
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Drop the artificial 2× token markup on `gemini-search`; charge users at the underlying `gemini-2.5-flash-lite` base rates. This also fixes the audio rate, which was below the text rate (inconsistent with everywhere else in the cost block).

Grounding fee (~$243/30d on the project) is now absorbed by Pollinations instead of being amortized through inflated token rates. Proper per-call grounding cost modeling will land in a follow-up PR.

User-facing effect for `gemini-search`:

| | Before (cost / price ×1.5) | After (cost / price ×1.5) |
|---|---:|---:|
| Text in | $0.20 / **$0.30**/M | $0.10 / **$0.15**/M |
| Cached | $0.02 / $0.03/M | $0.01 / $0.015/M |
| Audio in | $0.20 / $0.30/M | $0.30 / $0.45/M |
| Completion | $0.80 / $1.20/M | $0.40 / $0.60/M |

Most users see a ~50% price drop. Audio is +50% but volume is negligible (~300 tokens / 30d).

Also gitignores `/_local/` for local-only planning docs.

gist.headline: Half-price Gemini Search
gist.blurb: We've dropped the token markup on gemini-search, bringing text and completion costs down by 50%. The hive is absorbing the grounding fees so you can search the web for less.
gist.summary: The token markup on `gemini-search` has been removed, dropping text input from $0.30/M to $0.15/M and completions from $1.20/M to $0.60/M to match base `gemini-2.5-flash-lite` rates.
gist.impact: Users will see a ~50% price drop for most `gemini-search` requests, as Pollinations is now absorbing the underlying grounding fees.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature interacting with a price tag or receipt. Nomnom eating the 'fees' or the cut half of the price tag to represent the absorbed costs.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot holding a tiny pair of scissors, having just cut a digital price tag in half. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats the discarded half of the tag. A retro computer monitor in the background displays a glowing search bar. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley vibes. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
